description: Option-implied crash probability & tail index (SPY/QQQ/IWM): put-skew slope, 25/10-delta risk reversal + term structure, Breeden-Litzenberger risk-neutral density -> implied P(drop>=10/20%), RN skewness -> SKEW-style index. System tail gauge + regime + tail valuation (cheap/expensive). Feeds tail-hedge timing, risk-regime, crisis composites; upgrades implied-prob SPY crash probs from log-normal to true density.

schedule.description: Daily 13:00 UTC Tue-Sat — EOD-settled option smile
